faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal services in Yonkers range from $350 to $550 depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing before starting any work, with no hidden fees. Multiple nests or hard-to-reach locations may affect final pricing.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service throughout Yonkers and Westchester County for emergency situations. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, including treatment and safe nest extraction. We're available seven days a week during peak wasp season.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Yonkers residents most frequently encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and underground, while paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and overhangs. All species can become aggressive when defending their nests and require professional removal.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and the environment. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during treatment. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during the removal process, and the area is typically safe within a few hours after treatment.
